# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: MyWebApp
    type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    properties:
      kind: app,linux
      location: EastUS
      serverFarmId: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverFarms/<server_farm_name>
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: ConnectionString
            value: Server=my-sql-db.database.windows.net;Database=my-app-db;User Id=<username>;Password=<password>;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;
        connectionStrings:
          - name: myAppDb
            value: Server=my-sql-db.database.windows.net;Database=my-app-db;User Id=<username>;Password=<password>;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;
      deployment:
        continuousDeployment: true
        scmSiteId: /subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group_name>/providers/Microsoft.Web/sites/<scm_site_name>

  - name: my-sql-db
    type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    location: EastUS
    properties:
      administratorLogin: <username>
      administratorPassword: <password>
      version: "14"

  - name: my-storage-account
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    location: EastUS
    properties:
      accountKind: StorageV2
      accountTier: Standard_LRS
      accessTier: Hot
